title: Admin Control Center
body:
### DESCRIPTION
Admin Control Center is aimed to provied admins the ablility to easily control the server with out having to go throught all the pain of doing it manually and it has custom heads for a more appealing look. ACC has a variety of options to pick from. From Player management to OP items, ACC has it.

### FEATURES
1. PLAYER MANAGMENT
2. SERVER MANAGMENT
3. GAMEMODE GUI
4. TIME & WEATHER CONTROL
5. CHAT MANAGER
6. PLAYER TELEPORTATION
7. OP ITEMS
8. MYSTERY GUI

### FEATURES
Kick, Ban, and Temp Ban players\
Reload and Stop the Server, Turn off and on PVP\
Change your Gamemode\
Control the Time and the Weather\
Enable, Disable, and Clear chat\
Teleport to players or players to you\
OP Armor and Tools\
Mystery Feature

### HOW TO USE
all you need to do is run /acc! (you do have to be opped)

### REQUIERMENTS
None, just put in your plugins folder and play!

<details>
<summary>OTHER INFO</summary>

If you get any bugs please report to me and I will fix it as soon as possible.

</details>
